name: california-santa-barbara
description: Santa Barbara County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: Santa Barbara County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past Santa Barbara County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('Santa Barbara County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: Santa Barbara County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract Santa Barbara County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-santa-barbara-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-santa-barbara-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
The HTML contains a 'Page Not Found' error message, indicating the specific content for the Board of Supervisors representatives is not present in the provided snippet.
The page structure uses a grid system with classes like 'cpGrid cpGrid24' and 'row outer wide' which typically wrap the main content area.
The main content area is identified by the class 'moduleContentNew' and contains a heading 'Page Not Found'.
The URL provided (https://www.countyofsb.org/308/Board-of-Supervisors) suggests the content should be in a section with ID or class related to 'board-of-supervisors' or '308'.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for Santa Barbara County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: Santa Barbara County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for Santa Barbara County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: Santa Barbara County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
